task_completion.description: Portfolio Performance is open with the correct file loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Portfolio Performance application window with 'gift_transfer_portfolio' visible in the title bar or sidebar.

task_completion.description: The Delivery (Outbound) transaction dialog is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dialog box titled 'Delivery (Outbound)' or similar, indicating an outbound transfer of securities.

task_completion.description: The correct transaction details are entered in the dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the transaction dialog with the following fields filled: Security as 'Apple Inc' or 'AAPL', Date as '2024-12-15', Shares as '50', and Value/Amount as '12,250.00'. The account should be set to 'Schwab Brokerage'.

task_completion.description: The transaction is successfully recorded in the account
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the new 'Delivery (Outbound)' transaction for 50 shares of AAPL appearing in the transaction list for the 'Schwab Brokerage' account.

task_completion.description: The updated portfolio file is saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking the 'Save' icon, pressing Ctrl+S, or the filename 'gift_transfer_portfolio' in the title bar without an asterisk (*) next to it, indicating no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI to record the transaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the Portfolio Performance application interface, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of the agent opening 'gift_transfer_portfolio.xml' in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually add the transaction XML nodes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not write and execute a Python or shell script to modify the portfolio file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires recording a 'Delivery (Outbound)' transaction for 50 shares of Apple Inc (AAPL, ISIN: US0378331005) on 2024-12-15 with a total value of $12,250.00 in the 'Schwab Brokerage' account. The portfolio file is located at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/gift_transfer_portfolio.xml.
